explanation: This command exports the SYSTEM hive from the local machine to a file. It matches the Sigma rule by using regedit.exe with the -E flag, targeting a critical registry key.
This command uses the equivalent /E flag instead of -E and includes a long path prefix (\\?\) to bypass detection. It still exports a critical registry key, matching the Sigma rule.
This command exports the SAM hive using the -E flag. It matches the Sigma rule by targeting a critical registry key and using the export functionality.
This command exports the SYSTEM hive using the -E flag. It matches the Sigma rule by targeting a critical registry key and using the export functionality.
